pi_items.source: Confirmed in seed_bahmni.py line 59 where this UUID is assigned to the 'systolic_bp' concept with comment 'These are standard CIEL concept UUIDs pre-loaded in Bahmni Lite'. Web search verified this is from the CIEL (Columbia International eHealth Laboratory) concept dictionary, the standard OpenMRS/Bahmni vital signs concept set.

Confirmed as the standard medical term for CIEL concept 5085 (systolic blood pressure). Matches task description and documented in seed_bahmni.py code comments as a vital signs concept. Web search confirmed 'Systolic Blood Pressure' is the standard name for the upper/systolic pressure reading.

SBP is the standard medical abbreviation for Systolic Blood Pressure. Verified through web search results showing SBP used consistently in medical literature, scientific publications, and clinical guidelines (Mayo Clinic, American Heart Association, NCBI/PubMed). Also matches the setup_task.sh line 16 where TARGET_SYNONYM='SBP'.

Web search of OpenMRS and Bahmni documentation confirms the complete admin URL path is '/openmrs/admin/index.htm', not just '/openmrs/admin'. Multiple sources including Bahmni Wiki and OpenMRS Talk forums explicitly state the correct URL as 'https://<server-ip>/openmrs/admin/index.htm'. The metadata value omits the 'index.htm' suffix.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on CIEL concept UUID 5085AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA, the standard OpenMRS/Bahmni vital signs concept for 'Systolic Blood Pressure'. The target synonym to add is 'SBP', the standard medical abbreviation. Patient data in this environment is synthetically generated by seed_bahmni.py using realistic demographic distributions and names from US Census Bureau public data, creating 20 synthetic patients for testing. Concept definitions come from CIEL, the pre-loaded Columbia International eHealth Laboratory standard dictionary in Bahmni Lite. The claimed admin URL is incomplete (should include 'index.htm' suffix).
